name: Yappli
description: Tokyo-listed no-code mobile-app platform — push, CMS and REST API to build and operate iOS/Android apps.

seo.title: Yappli — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: Yappli: Tokyo-listed no-code mobile-app platform — push, CMS and REST API to build and operate iOS/Android apps.

when_to_use: No-code mobile app built and operated without iOS/Android dev
Push notification campaigns from Yappli CMS to app users
REST API integration syncing Yappli app data with backend systems
Japanese retail mobile app launched without native dev resources
CMS-driven content updates pushed to live iOS and Android app

pros: No-code iOS and Android apps, no dev team
Push, CMS, and REST API included
Strong for branded content and loyalty apps
cons: Japan focus — sales and docs bias east
Apps look templated without custom design
review.verdict: Reliable no-code mobile app platform for mid-market brands, especially in Japan, but pricing rules out indies.
review.best_for: Mid-market brands in Japan shipping branded loyalty or content apps without a dev team
review.not_for: Startups and indie makers — Glide or FlutterFlow fit smaller budgets
